keedian.ai
AI Bots Observability · ElevenLabs + Twilio · ia.call_audit_logs
Operational volume
Total Calls
—
?
Total calls recorded in the selected period and flow. Click to reset the call log to show all records.
Work Orders
—
Unique caseIds in period
?
Unique work orders (caseId) with at least one call attempt in the filtered period.
Calls / Work Order
—
avg attempts per WO
?
Average calls per work order. ~2 = active retry; ~1 = single-attempt flow.
Avg Duration
—
?
Average call duration in minutes, excluding zero-duration records.
Pre-contact Indicators · call state before the user answers · Twilio SIP layer
status · aggregated network result · click a card to filter the call log
done
—
?
Call connected and ended normally — SIP 200. The bot was able to start a conversation with the recipient. Click to filter the call log.
no-answer
—
?
Ringing but no one answered — SIP 480 / SIP 487. The destination did not pick up within the configured timeout. Click to filter the call log.
busy
—
?
Line was busy — SIP 486. The destination was already on another call at the time of the attempt. Click to filter the call log.
failed
—
?
Call could not be established — SIP 404 or LLM timeout. The attempt never reached the recipient. Click to filter the call log.
Max Duration
—
!
Terminated at maximum duration limit — SIP 200 + max duration. ElevenLabs force-closed the call at the time boundary. Click to filter the call log.
Twilio SIP — Non-connection Reason
Specific SIP rejection reason before reaching the user
Recipient action
Call error
Config error
Call log · individual call records for the selected period and flow
Work Order Call Records
Outbound calls initiated by the bot · click a Work Order ID to open the detail page · click a KPI card to filter
Started At Flow Work Order ID
In-call Indicators · ElevenLabs LLM post-call analysis — bot objective evaluation once contact was established · click a card to filter the call log
success
—
?
The bot achieved its objective during the conversation — the LLM evaluated the script as successfully completed.
failure
—
?
There was a conversation but the objective was not met — the recipient did not follow the script or the bot could not complete the task.
(no analysis)
—
?
No ElevenLabs evaluation — no real conversation took place or the call was too short for the LLM to analyze.
voicemail
—
?
The bot reached a voicemail or automated system — no real human contact was made.
Call Closure Indicators · ElevenLabs WebSocket/LLM layer — connected call termination type · % of connected calls
ElevenLabs · Call Closure Type
How connected calls ended — percentage over connected calls (done + completed)
Normal / expected closure
Bot-initiated closure
Attention
Error
Hourly Call Patterns Across the Week
Peak demand by hour and day · color = volume
Status Distribution
Share of total calls per status value
Volume by Flow
Total calls per configured bot flow
